description: Autonomous improvements to the SEO content engine

userStories.title: Add client directory listing to dashboard API
userStories.description: As an agency operator, I want the dashboard to show all onboarded clients from clients/ directory with their config.json summary
acceptanceCriteria: API /api/clients returns array of {slug, name, website, article_target} reading each clients/<slug>/config.json
Dashboard page.tsx renders a Clients section with one card per client
Excludes clients/.template
cd dashboard && npm run build passes
userStories.notes: Promoted from P2 to P1 -- unblocks multi-client visibility. SEO-001 blocked Ralph with no-diff.

userStories.title: Add content pipeline health dashboard API
userStories.description: As an agency operator, I want the /api/status endpoint to also return pipeline counts (topics, research, drafts, published, review-required) so the dashboard shows content flow metrics
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/status returns {pipeline: {topics, research, drafts, review_required, published}} with integer counts
Counts reflect both top-level dirs and clients/*/ dirs combined
Dashboard page.tsx renders a Pipeline section with each count
cd dashboard && npm run build passes
userStories.notes: Previously tried by Ralph but produced no diffs. Acceptance criteria made more concrete.

userStories.title: Wire scrub command to auto-run on all new drafts
userStories.description: As a content producer, I want the /write command's agent cascade to include /scrub as the first step to remove AI watermarks before SEO optimization
acceptanceCriteria: write.md command references scrub step
Scrub runs before content-analyzer
No manual intervention needed

userStories.title: Add content calendar command
userStories.description: As an agency operator, I want a /calendar command that generates a visual content calendar from all client content plans, showing what's due when
acceptanceCriteria: Command reads all clients/*/research/content-plan-*.md
Outputs merged calendar sorted by date
Saves to output/content-calendar.md

userStories.title: Gate publish on quality score composite
userStories.description: As a content producer, I want every article to be auto-scored BEFORE moving to published/. If composite < threshold (default 75), the article is held in review-required/ with the score log.
acceptanceCriteria: tools/quality_gate.py reads markdown + runs seo_quality_rater + readability + keyword analyzers
Score appended to output/quality-log.jsonl with {date, article, client, scores, composite}
Below threshold: article stays in review-required/ with a .score.json sidecar; above threshold: moves to published/
publish-draft.md command references the gate as step 1
userStories.notes: Replaces the old post-publish scoring story -- gate BEFORE publish, not after.

userStories.title: Add publish receipt callback from AutoSEO
userStories.description: As an agency operator, I want confirmation that articles pushed to AutoSEO actually landed. autoseo_bridge.push_article should write a receipt to clients/<slug>/published/<slug>.receipt.json on success.
acceptanceCriteria: push_article writes receipt with {pushed_at, article_id, website_id, response_status, source_draft}
Failure writes a .failure.json sidecar with error text
publish-to-autoseo.md documents the receipt location

userStories.title: Consolidate research scripts behind single CLI
userStories.description: As a developer, I want one `research.py` CLI that dispatches to the existing research_*.py modules via subcommands, so new clients have one tool to learn.
acceptanceCriteria: research.py with subcommands: serp, gaps, trending, performance, topics, priorities, quick-wins, competitor-gaps, performance-matrix
Each subcommand imports and runs main() of the matching research_*.py file
--help lists all subcommands

userStories.title: Version context/ presets with frozen snapshots
userStories.description: As an agency operator, I want context/ changes to be versioned so I can roll back bad edits that affect all clients.
acceptanceCriteria: context/VERSION file tracks semver bumped on each change
tools/context_snapshot.py copies current context/ to context/.snapshots/v<version>/
context/CHANGELOG.md records each snapshot reason
